title: Pure Origins
description: Adventure the wonders of Pure origins
body:
**Thanks to my beta tester zackpd for the quote :D**

> well the modpack from what I know seems to improve the atmosphere and vibe of the game while adding variation and life to mobs at the same time making the game somewhat more challenging and making it quite the modpack to play alone or with friends

- recommended to go into the modpack blind since not knowing what there is in the modpack makes the game more exciting

 **Thanks for YataYadaYaba for the quote**

> After testing for a good while, the modpack is actually really fun to play. The numerous origins and new worldgen changes make for a really fun and immersive twist on the default style of Minecraft. The modpack creates a nice roguelike feel to the game and is relatively lightweight under the right settings. Overall a great modpack, totally worth playing
